## Summary

What does this change do, and why?

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## Unreleased`
- [ ] Updated docs / `--help` if behavior or flags changed
- [ ] No secrets, real commercial game files, or generated memory committed
- [ ] Respected the layer boundaries and module facades (see CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything you want a reviewer to look at closely (trade-offs, follow-ups, risks).
